configurePresets.name: _base
configurePresets.description: Shared base: Ninja generator, vcpkg toolchain, exported compile_commands.json, and a single vcpkg install tree at build/_vcpkg_installed shared across every preset that inherits this one. Sharing is safe only while every inheriting preset uses the same triplet (arm64-osx today) with no ABI-affecting flags; a sanitizer preset (e.g. S1-02 asan-ubsan, S1-03 tsan) must either give itself its own _vcpkg_installed_<variant> path or confirm its ABI matches what's already in the shared tree.

configurePresets.name: debug
configurePresets.description: Debug build: -g, no optimization. Day-to-day development.

configurePresets.name: release
configurePresets.description: Release build: -O3 -DNDEBUG. Shipping and performance benchmarks.

configurePresets.name: tidy
configurePresets.description: Debug build that runs clang-tidy on every compilation unit (NFR-8 static-analysis gate). Check set and suppressions configured in S0-06.

configurePresets.name: asan
configurePresets.description: Debug build with AddressSanitizer. Local use; not wired into CI by S0-04.
